= schema
:description: Project directory

This directory is part of the paint.type project.

== Purpose

Project directory.


As a Level 3 directory (`third_party/gossamer/schema/`), it supports the overall
project structure.

== Contents by Functional Grouping\n\n=== Configuration\n\n* `gossamer.conf.schema.json` — JSON configuration\n* `groove-manifest.schema.json` — JSON configuration\n\n
== Purpose of Each Component

Each file in this directory serves a specific purpose.

*Configuration files* define build, test, and deployment parameters.\n
